intent: Persist PR reviews with rich markdown summary in PR comments + local review hook for dogfooding

changed.summary: PR comment now includes rich markdown summary extracted from SYSTEM_DELTA.json (intent, changes, blast radius, decisions, scope violations) with download link
changed.before: Simple comment linking to workflow artifact download
structural_changes: added: reads SYSTEM_DELTA.json and builds structured markdown body
added: sections for Changes, Added, Removed, Blast Radius, Key Decisions, Scope Violations
modified: comment body from static string to dynamic delta-driven content

edges_added.description: hook invokes serve-review.sh when changes detected
starts differ serve on available port

decision_trace.decision: Rich markdown summary in PR comment rather than just artifact link
decision_trace.rationale: Markdown is immediately readable in the PR with zero setup. The interactive HTML stays as a downloadable artifact for deeper exploration.

decision_trace.decision: Claude Code Stop hook for local review serving
decision_trace.rationale: Stop hook fires exactly when the agent finishes work. Conditional on dirty working tree so it only runs after actual changes, not planning.

decision_trace.decision: Auto-find available port instead of fixed port
alternatives: Fixed port with error on conflict
decision_trace.rationale: Multiple workspaces may run differ serve simultaneously. Scanning ports 3141-3200 avoids conflicts without config.

decision_trace.decision: Open-core architecture — free markdown + self-serve Pages, paid hosted service later
decision_trace.rationale: Free tier drives adoption with zero setup. Hosted service (reviews.differ.dev) becomes the monetizable upgrade for private repos and teams.
